notes: Full coverage: habit, foliage close, white raceme mass + face-on flower macro, ripe + fall fruit, burgundy fall color. All correct species.

Alder has no showy petalled flower; bloom = catkins. sp-catkins shot is a distant against-sky tangle (small/partial), so flowers scored 1 — a fixable closer catkin shot would lift it. front_facing/bloom_in_context NA (catkin, not a faced bloom; not a heavy bloomer). Winter habit, summer leaves+green cones, fall woody cones all good.

cap_note: shots species-representative (limited/no CC cultivar photos)

cap_note: shots species-representative (limited/no CC cultivar photos)

No habit, no real foliage. Most fixes are likely only species-representative since CC cultivar-specific photos are scarce — flag as such in gaps if re-sourced.

cap_note: shots species-representative (limited/no CC cultivar photos)
notes: su-habit and su-close show the laden fruiting tree well (red-orange tart cherries). sp-flowers is a small cluster against blue sky. Foliage only readable as backdrop. seed_pods NA (cherries are the crop, shown).

cap_note: shots species-representative (limited/no CC cultivar photos)

cap_note: shots species-representative (limited/no CC cultivar photos)

cap_note: shots species-representative (limited/no CC cultivar photos)

cap_note: shots species-representative (limited/no CC cultivar photos); Per the plant's existing gaps note, NO open-licensed 'Summercrisp' cultivar photo exists anywhere (Commons/iNat/GBIF/Openverse/Flickr as of 2026-06); all shots are species-representative Pyrus communis. Cultivar-true shots are structurally unavailable; any added shot would also be species-representative and must be honestly captioned.
notes: sp-flowers (face-on white pear blossom, crisp) and su-foliage (clear glossy leaves) are strong; su-fruit good. The only true content gap is whole-plant/habit, but even that can only be filled species-representative. Treat as capped-good per the gaps note.

sp-habit (whole shrub in bloom = mass), sp-panicle (crisp face-on florets = close-up), fa-foliage (clear heart-shaped leaves), wi-winter (bare snowy shrub). Full coverage. seed_pods NA (lilac capsules not a notable feature).

Comprehensive 7-shot reel: winter red-stem habit + close stems, white flower cluster close-up + flowering-mass bush (su-bloom), clear foliage, white fall berries. All correct species, all seasons of interest covered.

sp-habit (low thicket), sp-bloom (flowering mass), su-flower (crisp face-on pink bloom), su-foliage (leaves + early hips), fa-hips (red hips), wi-hip (persistent hip in snow). Full seasonal + structural coverage.

su-habit (silver mound with violet flowers = mass), su-flowers/su-bloom (purple bracts), su-flower (face-on blue salvia bloom emerging from bract), su-foliage (silver leaves), fa-fall (late-season spent inflorescences). Strong. seed_pods NA (nutlets not a feature).

cap_note: Russian sage flowers are tiny lavender-blue lipped florets borne in an airy panicle on spikes; an individual floret cannot meaningfully be shown 'face-on' the way a daisy or rose can. su-flowers2 gets the closest achievable (florets in detail). Structural cap, not a fixable gap.
notes: su-habit (airy lavender-blue haze = mass), su-flowers2 (best-achievable floret close-up), su-flowers, fa-spikes (mass), su-foliage (clear silver dissected leaves). front_facing capped per the spike/panicle convention. seed_pods NA.

Foliage grass: flowers/front_facing/bloom_in_context NA. fa-habit (mahogany-copper clump), su-habit (summer clump), su-bluegreen (blue-green summer foliage), wi-habit (winter clump), fa-pods (fluffy seedheads). All seasons of interest + seedheads covered. Verify-species: consistent S. scoparium throughout.

su-flower (face-on lavender ray daisy with bee), su-habit (drift of bloom = mass), fa-seeds (silvery seedheads, well shown). su-foliage is the weak axis — narrow leaves blend into surrounding grass and aren't crisply readable.

su-flower (face-on blue/white bloom with spurs), sp-bloom & su-habit & sp-habit (plant in bloom / mass), sp-bloom2, su-foliage (clear blue-green divided leaves), fa-seedhead (upright follicles). Comprehensive.

sp-habit (chartreuse dome = mass), sp-flower (face-on detail of the yellow cyathia/bracts), sp-foliage & su-foliage (clear leaves), fa-color (red-orange autumn foliage — the signature fall feature). Euphorbia 'flowers' are bract clusters, well shown face-on. seed_pods NA (capsules not notable).

Tender warm-season → seasonal NA. su-bloom & fa-fall are excellent flowering-mass shots, su-flower is a crisp face-on coral bloom (great close-up). Weakness is habit/foliage: the two 'habit' tiles are cluttered (one against a wall of vines), and no clean foliage shot. seed_pods NA (tubers/no notable seedhead).

sp-bloom (magenta clump in bloom = mass), sp-flower (face-on blush double bloom close-up), sp-foliage (emerging red-bronze divided leaves), sp-habit (clump with pale double blooms + buds), fa-fall (bronze autumn foliage). Note: foliage/flower color differs between tiles (red double mass vs pale double) — looks like mixed cultivars but acceptable for the species page; flag only if cultivar fidelity matters. seed_pods NA (peony follicles not the feature).

notes: sp-habit (spreading mat = mass), sp-flower (face-on yellow-green cyathia/bracts), su-foliage & sp-bloom & fa-detail (clear leaves/habit), su-pods (the horned capsules — its namesake, well shown). All shots spring/summer green; seasonal scored 1 conservatively, but if this small native has no real fall/winter interest it is arguably NA → would make it excellent. Lean toward NA on re-review; left as a soft fixable note.

Strong, complete reel: clear habit mass, sharp face-on flowers (sp-flower, sp-bloom2, sp-flower2), readable dissected foliage (sp-foliage), the distinctive fuzzy seed capsule (su-pods), and a fall foliage shot. Every axis a clean 2.

cap_note: Capped at good: Salvia nemorosa flowers are densely packed upright spikes of small two-lipped florets; a true face-on single-bloom shot is not how this plant presents. su-floret macro shows one floret angled/profile (the natural view). No seed-pod feature (the spent calyx spikes are foliage-grade, covered by fa-foliage).
notes: Good habit (su-habit), strong flower mass (su-flower, sp-spring), distinct grey-green felted foliage (fa-foliage), and a nice floret macro. front_facing is a structural spike cap, not a fixable gap.

Complete: face-on whorled red flower close-up (su-flower), good flowering habit/mass (su-habit, su-bloom), readable foliage (su-foliage2), and two seedhead shots (fa-pods spent flower, wi-seedhead). All axes 2.

Crisp face-on white-daisy close-up (su-flower), flowering mass habit (su-habit), readable toothed foliage (su-foliage), and the spring basal rosette (sp-rosette) covers the off-season. Seedheads not a notable feature. Excellent.

notes: Good reel: silvery palmate foliage readable (su-foliage, su-foliage2), flower racemes (su-flower) and mass (su-habit, su-bloom). fa-pods shows thin/drying immature pods, not a clean fat pod — flagged fixable per the rubric (re-query iNat fruiting), though IMAGE_AUDIT notes this may be an unfillable cap.

Complete: lavender pom-pom flower close-up (su-flower), flowering mass habit (su-habit), readable lance foliage (su-foliage), and two strong seedhead shots (fa-seedhead, wi-winter-seedhead). All axes 2.

cap_note: seed_pods: no pod-isolated CC macro; capsules shown amid foliage
notes: Strong face-on orange cup (su-flower), excellent bloom mass (su-bloom, su-drift, su-habit), readable lacy blue-green foliage (su-foliage). su-pods is really a foliage shot — the slender capsule isn't clearly read; seed_pods scored 1, fixable. Annual → seasonal NA.

Crisp face-on pink flower (su-flower), bloom mass field (su-bloom), ferny foliage clearly read (su-foliage, su-plant), and whole-plant habit (su-habit). Annual → seasonal NA; seedheads not a notable feature → NA. Excellent.

Complete: pink spidery flower head close-up (su-flower2), prairie drift mass (su-drift), habit shots (su-habit, su-habit2), the distinctive dangling seed pods (fa-pods), and palmate foliage (su-foliage). Annual → seasonal NA. All applicable axes 2.

Flowers are strong: face-on pink bloom macro (su-flower), spike mass (su-habit2), good seed-pod shots (su-pods, su-pods2 skull-like capsules). But su-habit and su-foliage are scrappy wild/wall-crack plants (Pick-QC: wall/pavement setting) — both whole_plant and foliage scored 1, fixable. Annual → seasonal NA.

The feature is the white-margined bracts/leaves, shown clearly face-on (su-habit macro, su-flower), with whole-plant/mass (su-habit2, su-bloom) and a habit-in-context (su-foliage). Flowers are tiny cyathia but the bract display is the bloom — well covered. Annual → seasonal NA; seedpods not a notable feature → NA.

Excellent structure/habit (wi-structure pergola, su-habit wall mass), red hips (fa-hips), and a foliage macro (su-foliage). Cultivar = generic climbing roses, so a representative close-up is fine.
Crisp face-on purple flower (su-flower), flowering mass on a fence (su-habit), readable foliage (su-foliage), and the silky feathery seedheads (fa-seeds, a notable clematis feature). All axes 2.

Strong habit (su-habit pergola tunnel, shared wi-structure), red hips (fa-hips), foliage macro (su-foliage). Like climbing rose, missing a sharp single-flower close-up — su-flower is a backlit cluster — so flowers/front_facing are each 1 (fixable). Note su-habit and wi-structure pergola appear shared with climbing-rose; representative ramblers, acceptable for a cultivar group.

Face-on fringed pink flower (sp-flower, sp-bloom), flowering mat mass (sp-bloom2, sp-habit), the blue-green grassy evergreen foliage mat (su-foliage, wi-evergreen). Seedheads not a notable feature → NA. Excellent.

Complete: sharp face-on sky-blue flower (su-flower, su-foliage shot), airy flowering habit (su-habit, su-bloom, sp-firstbloom), wispy linear foliage readable (su-foliage2), and the round seed capsules (su-seedpods). All axes 2.

Dense panicle close-up face-on (su-flower magenta, su-habit2, su-foliage2 lilac), flowering mass (su-bloom, su-habit), readable lance foliage (su-foliage3, sp-emerging). Seedheads not a notable garden feature → NA. Excellent.

The plant's two features — silver-marbled heart-shaped leaves and airy forget-me-not-blue sprays — are both shown crisply: foliage mound (su-foliage), flower close-up over leaves (sp-flower, sp-bloom), flowering habit (sp-habit2, sp-bloom2). Seedheads not notable → NA. Spring-foliage perennial; main interest is spring bloom + the season-long foliage which is shown → seasonal NA. Excellent.

Crisp face-on lavender pincushion close-up (su-flower), flowering mass (su-mass), basal foliage rosette readable (su-foliage), and the distinctive starry papery seedhead pod (fa-pods). su-bloom is a distant meadow shot with the flower as a small speck, but su-mass already covers bloom-in-context well, so all axes still resolve to 2. Excellent.

cap_note: front_facing capped: pea-flowers on a vertical raceme can't present a single bloom face-on; su-flower shows the raceme (best achievable).

Good shrub coverage: habit (su-habit, su-foliage), the dark-red bracts/pods (su-pods, su-bloom), the glossy black paired berries with red involucre (su-berries — the signature feature, shown well), and readable foliage (su-foliage2). su-habit (mass in bloom) + su-flower (face-on white 4-petal) + two clean foliage shots + fa-fall (yellowing leaves + dry seed capsules). Dry capsules, not a notable berry/fruit feature, so seed_pods NA. su-habit2 is a weaker distant/cluttered habit but su-habit covers whole_plant well. Spring/summer/fall covered.

The display is the pink feathery seed plumes, not true flowers (tiny/insignificant) — scored as the plant's signature 'bloom'. su-habit (mass of plumes) + su-plumes (close-up) cover bloom_in_context; su-foliage (purple leaves) + sp-spring + fa-color (fall) + wi-framework (bare winter) give full 4-season coverage. front_facing NA (no showy face-on flower). sp-bloom + sp-flower (face-on strappy white petals) cover bloom; su-fruit (blue-black pomes) is clear seed_pods/fruit; su-foliage clear. su-habit is a smallish, somewhat cluttered habit shot (1). Spring bloom + summer fruit/foliage = good seasonal.

sp-flower (face-on golden trumpets) crisp; sp-bloom + sp-habit cover mass/whole-plant; su-foliage clear lobed leaves. su-fruit shows only a sparse handful of small ripening berries — fruit is a notable edible feature so a fuller ripe-berry cluster would lift it to 2.

sp-bloom (whole shrub in bloom) + sp-flower (face-on 5-petal pink-blushed) cover bloom_in_context; su-fruit (ripe scarlet cherries) + su-habit (dense red-fruit mass) cover seed_pods/fruit; su-foliage (downy tomentose leaves) clear. Spring bloom + summer fruit = full coverage.

su-fruit + su-fruit2 (matte-black berry clusters) strong seed_pods=2; su-foliage (lobed aromatic leaves) clear=2. Weak on flowers (no dedicated flower close-up — only incidental in cluttered sp-habit), no clean whole-plant form, and no fall season.

su-habit (bush laden with dark-red berries) good whole_plant=2; sp-flower (face-on reddish bell with reflexed sepals) crisp face-on=2; sp-foliage clear lobed leaves=2; su-fruit clear ripe berry=2. Missing a flowering-mass shot and a fall season.

fa-habit (shrub with black berries) + sp-flower (face-on white corymb, pink anthers) + sp-bloom (mass) cover whole_plant/flowers/bloom; fa-berries (glossy black pomes) seed_pods=2; fa-fall (brilliant wine-red autumn foliage) + su-foliage cover foliage and full spring/summer/fall seasonality. Wind-pollinated, dioecious, no showy flowers — flowers/front_facing/bloom_in_context all NA. su-habit (silvery upright form) + su-foliage (narrow silver-scaly leaves) + su-thorns + three strong fall orange-berry shots (fa-berries, fa-berries2 face-on, fa-fruit branch) cover seed_pods=2 and summer/fall seasonality.

sp-foliage (whole mat smothered in white bloom) + sp-bloom (silver woolly mat) + su-foliage (out-of-bloom silver mat) cover whole_plant/foliage/bloom-mass and spring-bloom + summer-foliage seasons. sp-flower is the single face-on flower but set in distracting grass/litter — re-source a cleaner close-up. su-close (vivid magenta many-rayed flower, face-on) =2; su-structure (mat in full bloom) bloom_in_context=2; su-foliage (fleshy cylindrical succulent leaves) =2; su-mat (spreading mat on slope) whole_plant=2. Crisp face-on golden daisy, thread-fine foliage readable (su-foliage2 basal rosette + thread foliage in habit), clump habit, mass drift (su-mass) + close-up both present. seed_pods NA; seasonal NA (summer forb).

Full reel: face-on red-and-gold daisy, mounding habit (habit/habit2), drift/colony mass, hairy lance foliage, and fall fluffy-globe seedheads (fa-seedhead) shown well. Summer bloom + fall seedhead covers seasonal.

PICK-QC ISSUE: su-foliage is HAND-DOMINATED (a hand holding the pinnate leaf fills the frame) — auto-reject pattern; su-foliage2 basal rosette is partly lost in grass. Flowers crisp face-on, habit + drift mass + close present, fa-fall shows a forming spiny seedhead. Summer + fall seasonal.

notes: Yellow 'Mersea Yellow' form throughout (matches the cultivar). Needle-fine evergreen foliage clear (su-foliage + wi-winter), yellow tubular wands, mound habit (mass) + bloom close-up, winter foliage covers seasonal. seed_pods NA (capsules not notable).

'Moonshine'. Flat-topped gold corymbs are face-on (yarrow flat-tops qualify), silver-grey ferny foliage clear (su-foliage + sp-foliage), mounded clump (su-mound/su-structure mass) + close-up. Summer bloom + spring foliage seasonal. seed_pods NA.

Pink urn-shaped spring flowers crisp, glossy evergreen leaves (foliage + habit), red berries shown well (fa-berries/fa-pods), winter bronze foliage. Four seasons covered. bloom_in_context NA (foliage/berry groundcover, flowers small and not a heavy flowering mass).

Yellow flower clusters crisp (sp-close), low creeping mat habit (sp-structure), holly-like compound leaves readable, dusty-blue berries shown well (fa-berries), bronze-purple winter foliage. Spring/fall/winter seasonal covered. bloom_in_context NA (a foliage/berry evergreen, not a heavy flowering mass).

'Rozanne'. Crisp violet-blue saucer with white eye face-on, deeply-lobed palmate foliage clear, sprawling mound (su-habit mass) + several-saucer context + close-up. seed_pods NA (sterile hybrid, rarely sets seed). seasonal NA (one long bloom season summer-frost; no notable fall colour). Note: su-foliage caption flags the species ancestor G. wallichianum, which is fine.

Face-on lavender cups with golden stamens, low clump (sp-clump/sp-habit mass) + close, dissected ferny foliage readable (su-foliage), and the ornamental silky plumed seedhead shown well (sp-seedhead). Spring bloom + spring plume + summer foliage seasonal. (sp-foliage tile is mislabeled — shows buds not foliage — but su-foliage covers foliage.)

Tall wiry habit/mass (fa-bloom/fa-flower), face-on pink & white blooms, bold palmate foliage (su-foliage/sp-spring), and the cottony bursting seedhead shown well (fa-seedhead). Fall bloom + fall seedhead + spring/summer foliage seasonal.

Face-on blue daisies (multiple tiles), deeply-lobed foliage readable, low colony/clump form (sp-colony/sp-foliage mass) + close-up. seed_pods NA; seasonal NA (spring ephemeral tuber, single season of interest).

cap_note: Effectively-excellent: seasonal capped at 1 — no open-licensed winter shot of the semi-evergreen steel-blue clump exists (documented in CLAUDE.md/IMAGE_AUDIT.md). Summer + fall are covered.
notes: Foliage-only ornamental grass: front_facing NA, bloom_in_context NA. Steel-blue mound habit, fine blue foliage clear, oat-like spikelets/seedheads shown well (su-seedheads + fa-fall-clump). Re-query iNat for a CC winter clump if one ever surfaces.

cap_note: seed_pods: no clean dried-silique macro; siliques shown with flowers
notes: Whole-plant on scree, orange & yellow face-on clusters (sp-flower/sp-bloom2), lance foliage readable, whole flowering stems (mass) + close. su-pods does show siliques in the full image but the plant is dried/messy and the pods read small/thin in the thumbnail — partial.

LOOK-ALIKE / WRONG-SPECIES ISSUE: sp-foliage2 is NOT Veronica liwanensis — it shows large lobed/scalloped hairy leaves with seed structures of a different plant (caption mislabels it as the evergreen mat). su-mat (a potted plant with a 'Veronica liwanensis' nursery LABEL) and sp-foliage do show the correct tiny-glossy-leaved tight mat, so the correct species is confirmed and well-represented — foliage scored 1 only because of the bad tile, which should be replaced. Also: sp-flower has slightly larger/more-toothed leaves than ideal (borderline but flowers + su-mat label confirm V. liwanensis). Cobalt 4-lobed flowers face-on, dense mat (sp-bloom/sp-habit mass) + close, summer mat. seed_pods NA.

Magenta saucers face-on, mounding mat (su-structure mass) + close, deeply-cut palmate foliage clear, crimson fall foliage (fa-fall), and the namesake stork's-beak seed capsule shown well (su-pods). Summer bloom + fall colour + spring seasonal.

PICK-QC ISSUE: wi-seeds is HAND-DOMINATED (two fingers + a ring fill much of the frame) — auto-reject pattern; pappus visible but it's a hand-held shot. Otherwise strong: tiny white-and-gold daisies face-on, smothered bloom mass (fa-bloom) + close, fine heath-like foliage clear (su-foliage), silvery mound habit. Fall bloom + winter seeds + summer foliage seasonal.

cap_note: seed_pods: pappus seedheads lost in dried grass in every CC shot
notes: Single white-rayed daisy face-on (fa-flower) crisp, mounding bloom mass (fa-structure) + close, narrow grey-green lance foliage readable (fa-foliage/su-summer). fa-seedheads shows the fluffy pappus but it's backlit/washed and lost in dried prairie grass — partial. Fall bloom + fall seedhead + summer foliage seasonal.

Tall branching habit (fa-habit), face-on white daisies (fa-flower), colony mass at streamside (fa-bloom), narrow willow-like lance foliage (fa-foliage/su-summer), and a clean dense pappus seedhead close (fa-seedhead). Fall bloom + seedhead + summer foliage seasonal.

Fringed blue cornflowers face-on with reddish-purple center (sp-bloom/su-rebloom), sprawling silvery-stemmed clump (sp-habit2/sp-flower mass) + close, silver-woolly lance foliage clear (sp-foliage). Spring bloom + summer rebloom seasonal. seed_pods NA (knapweed-type seedheads not an ornamental feature and deadheaded to contain spread).

Hooded white-and-mauve flowers shown front-on under spiny bracts (su-flowers), full vertical flower spikes in habitat (su-bloom mass) + close, bold glossy deeply-lobed foliage clear (sp-foliage), architectural clump habit (su-habit). Summer bloom + spring foliage seasonal. seed_pods NA. (Tender ~zone 7 here, noted in blurb.)
Crisp mauve raceme close-up + bee shot + flowering spike + grey-leaved mound in border. Spring bloom and summer habit both covered; foliage readable in habit shot. All-around strong.

Yellow + orange-red flower close-ups face-on, flowering clump in rocky habit, and a clear seed-pod (silique) shot. Seedpod image is on graph/grid paper (clinical background) but is not a pressed specimen and shows the pods well; minor cosmetic ding only.

cap_note: shots species-representative (limited/no CC cultivar photos); Photos are species-representative Erysimum, not the exact 'Apricot Twist' cultivar (no open-licensed cultivar photo exists per the plant's gaps note). The flowers/front_facing are good but the mass and habit shots are weak (flowers lost in grass, sparse plant in bare dirt). Fixable gaps are all sourceable from generic Erysimum even within the cultivar cap.
notes: Only 3 shots. Close-up apricot flower is excellent and face-on; the other two are poor (subject lost in grass / sparse weedy-dirt habit).

Annual -> seasonal NA. Spurred orange flower face-on, round peltate leaves clear, flowers+foliage trailing mass, scrambling habit. Foliage shot has a metal edging/wall in background but leaves are fully readable; minor only.

Tender perennial -> seasonal NA. Bold red cluster, white-flowered shot showing scallop-edged zoned leaves clearly, pink form, and container-grown plants in flower (outdoor container display, acceptable habit). Strong all round.

Species ID confirmed via full su-habit.jpg (magenta flower + glossy ivy leaves are genuine P. peltatum) BUT the habit shot is staged against a doorway/window wall with a separate potted succulent dominating the foreground, and the thumbnail crops to that succulent. The su-foliage shot is a distant cascade against the sea (foliage unreadable). The su-close flower is gorgeous (face-on, crisp). Two weak shots drag it to fair.

Tender perennial -> seasonal NA; foliage-grown so flowers genuinely secondary (bloom_in_context NA, not a heavy bloomer). Foliage (the whole point) is readable and good. But several shots have wall/stucco/pavement backgrounds and the habit is a sparse potted seedling. Flowers are tiny/partial. Foliage = 2, everything else soft.

Tender perennial -> seasonal NA. Ruffled dark-blotched blooms face-on are excellent, pleated serrated leaves clear, mass+close both present. Only weak axis is whole_plant (no clean habit; sp-habit is flowers/foliage over bare soil).

Spring-ephemeral bulb -> seasonal & seed_pods NA. Face-on purple flowers, naturalized mass in grass, clump in litter, silvery-exterior close-up with grassy foliage. Everything covered for a small bulb.

cap_note: Capped at good: snowdrop flowers are pendant/nodding bells that physically never face-on. The diagnostic inner green U-mark is shown well (sp-flower2), which is the best achievable. Structural cap, not an oversight.
notes: Spring-ephemeral bulb -> seasonal & seed_pods NA. Backlit flower, pendant-bell + green-mark close-up, grassy clump habit, and a naturalized drift. Effectively excellent given the pendant-flower structural cap on front_facing.

Spring-ephemeral bulb/tuber -> seasonal & seed_pods NA. Face-on yellow cups on the green bract ruff, mass/colony, and a clear leafy-ruff habit shot. Upward-facing cups give a genuine face-on. Strong throughout.
Spring-ephemeral bulb -> seasonal & seed_pods NA. Cobalt-blue falls with yellow signal face-on and crisp, clump habit in litter, a mass, and grassy foliage. All axes covered.

Winter bloomer, evergreen. Face-on white flower with golden stamen boss, alpine/woodland flowering clumps (mass), and a clear leathery palmate evergreen foliage shot. Winter bloom + foliage = seasonal interest covered. Strong.

cap_note: Capped at good: Erica carnea flowers are pendant urn/bell shapes that don't present face-on; the urn form + dark anthers are shown well in the close-up, which is the best achievable. Structural cap.
notes: Winter bloomer. Mat habit, dense flowering mass, crisp urn-flower close-up, needle-whorl foliage. Winter bloom + foliage covered. Effectively excellent aside from the structural pendant-urn cap on front_facing. (Note: a couple of shots have some dead-twig/leaf-litter clutter mixed in, but mass + close are clean.)
Tender perennial -> seasonal NA. Mounded plant in bloom, flowering mass, clear needle foliage, and a face-on two-lipped blue flower with exserted stamens. All axes covered.
Annual -> seasonal & seed_pods NA. White mounding mat, dense carpet mass, face-on 4-petal flower-cluster close-up, and a spreading mound showing the narrow grey-green foliage. Strong.
Annual -> seasonal & seed_pods NA. Bold purple and white face-on blotched flowers (crisp), a yellow flowering mass, and a planter/clump showing leaves & habit. All axes covered.

PICK-QC FLAG: the wi-flower full image is cut branches staged against a grey car-seat/leather interior (indoor staged background) - trips the wall/indoor reject, though the flowers ARE the right species, abundant and crisp. Only 3 shots, no dedicated foliage, no seed capsules, no fall colour. Weakest plant in this group; recommend re-sourcing the flower shot in situ plus adding foliage/fall/capsule shots.

Excellent yellow flower cluster on bare twigs (mass + close), clear opposite oval foliage, and clean red-drupe fruit (su-fruit2). su-fruit is hand-held (fingers in frame) but su-fruit2 covers it. Main weaknesses: distant cluttered woodland habit and its poor thumb framing; fall colour missing.

cap_note: whole_plant: whole-shrub form scarce; smart-crop thumb leans to foliage
notes: front_facing NA - willow catkins have no flower face. Catkins (the feature) shown both close (wi-catkins) and as a branch mass (sp-mass); foliage shot shows lanceolate leaves with silvery undersides clearly; seasonal covered (winter catkins + summer/fall leaf). Only weak axis is whole_plant (cluttered thicket habit). Seed not a notable feature -> seed_pods NA.

CO-native Helianthus annuus. Face-on flower close-up, whole plant (broad leaves readable, in a dry/weedy setting but form clear), a second flower close-up, a plant-in-bloom habit, and dried fall seedheads. Seedhead covers seed_pods and fall season. Strong throughout.

CO-native Iris missouriensis. Face-on flower with yellow signal (crisp, ladybug bonus), a second flower, a meadow mass, a flowering clump habit, and grassy foliage fans. Verified full su-foliagepod.jpg: shows the foliage well plus immature seed capsules among the leaves (hence seed_pods=1 partial, not 0). One fixable axis.

cap_note: bloom_in_context: no true multi-plant flowering drift under open license
notes: All three 'flower' shots are close-ups of the nodding umbel; the file captioned su-mass is a single umbel, not a mass. Fall dried seedhead is good (seasonal=2). CO native so all gaps are easily sourceable via iNat place_id=34.

sp-foliagehabit (full) is a textbook whole-plant: woolly silver basal rosette readable, flowers on bare stalks; sp-flower face-on crisp; sp-clump shows the flowering drift. seed_pods NA (spent heads not a notable display feature); seasonal NA (one season of interest — long bloom, no distinct fall/winter form).

Two crisp face-on flower close-ups, a good mass drift, and a clean fall dried seedhead (seasonal=2). su-habit full IS a clear whole-plant (whole_plant=2) but the thumbnail crop leaves it small and lost in tan grass — thumb_framing dinged. Foliage only secondary in the habit shot.
Two excellent face-on flower close-ups (single + double), foliage clearly readable, su-mass a good drift. Only the clean single-plant habit is lacking. Annual -> seasonal NA; seed_pods NA.

Two crisp face-on flowers (blue, pink) and a standout inflated horned 'balloon' seedpod (seed_pods=2). But no habit, no clean foliage, and no bloom mass — the captioned su-foliage is a white flower, not foliage. Annual -> seasonal NA.

Two crisp face-on blue flowers and a good mass drift (bloom_in_context=2). Missing a clean single-plant habit and a dedicated foliage read. Annual -> seasonal NA; seedheads not notable -> seed_pods NA.

Full coverage: flower close-up, flowers+foliage+tendrils (clean foliage read), a climbing-habit shot showing the vine form, and a mass drift. Pea pods are toxic/not an ornamental feature -> seed_pods NA; annual -> seasonal NA.

cap_note: STRUCTURAL CAP: amaranth's drooping rope-like tassels (love-lies-bleeding type) have no flower 'face' to photograph head-on — front_facing cannot reach 2. The tassels are shown crisply and in context, which is the best possible.
notes: whole_plant habit (minor building/AC background but form clear), good foliage read, crisp tassel close-up, and a bloom mass. The flowering tassels are also the seedheads, so seed_pods NA (already shown). Annual -> seasonal NA. Capped at good by the no-face tassel.

Genus mix of cockscomb (cristata) + plume (spicata) forms, which is fine. Bloom mass cockscomb is crisp, su-habit + plume shot show whole-plant form, foliage clearly readable. Plumes/combs have no 'face' so front_facing reads fine (form fully shown). Minor: the su-flowerplume single-plant shot has a gravel background and an early/small plume, but the cockscomb mass carries the flowers axis. Plumes are the seedheads -> seed_pods NA; annual -> seasonal NA.

cap_note: COLOR CAP (cosmetic, not an axis gap): only the yellow species form is available under open license — no CC shots of the warm-toned cultivar color range exist. All eight rubric axes are met by the yellow form.
notes: Face-on yellow flower close-up, clump-with-foliage (clean foliage read), and a bloom mass drift. Papery flowers are the persistent display, so no separate seedhead -> seed_pods NA; annual -> seasonal NA. Excellent; only the cultivar color range is unavailable.

Face-on flower close-up, bloom mass drift, a clear whole-plant habit with basal leaves, and a dedicated foliage shot. Seedheads not a notable display -> seed_pods NA; annual -> seasonal NA. Full coverage.

sp-flower (full) is a good open-cup view into the interior (stamens/markings) = face-on; sp-flower2 open red cup; sp-habit a yellow clump with strappy foliage readable; sp-mass a red drift. Tulips deadheaded -> seed_pods NA; spring-only bulb -> seasonal NA. Full coverage.
Tulipa tarda-type open stars: two crisp face-on star close-ups, a clump habit (open stars + foliage), and a clean foliage shot. Spring-only bulb -> seasonal NA; seed_pods NA. Full coverage.

sp-flower is crisp and face-on (minor: fingers steadying it in one corner). Mass + close-up give bloom_in_context=2. Weak on whole-plant form and foliage (both lost in leaf litter), and thumbs crop loosely. Spring-only bulb -> seasonal NA; seed_pods NA.

Two crisp face-on open cups, an atmospheric sunset drift (mass), and a clustered habit/cup shot. The thin grassy leaves never get a clean read (foliage=1) but are diagnostic and sourceable. Spring-only bulb -> seasonal NA; seed_pods NA.

sp-flower a crisp face-on purple bloom; sp-habit + sp-mass show the clumps with the diagnostic sword fans (foliage clearly readable). The file captioned sp-foliage is actually a distant flowering clump, not a leaf close-up, but foliage is well covered elsewhere -> foliage=2. Spring bloom; seedpods not a notable display -> seed_pods NA; seasonal NA.

Crisp purple globe close-up, two mass-planting drifts, and a clean foliage shot (whole_plant/foliage/flowers/front_facing/bloom_in_context all 2 — the spherical umbel reads from any angle). One add — a dried seedhead globe — lifts both seed_pods and seasonal to 2.

Individual glad florets ARE face-on (su-flower, su-flowermass) so no spike cap needed; su-habit shows the spike + sword foliage form. Two close-ups + spike-in-context cover bloom_in_context. Minor: su-flower2 is shot against a plain wall background (still outdoors, subject crisp) — not enough to dock thumb_framing. Corms lifted, no notable pod -> seed_pods NA; summer-only display -> seasonal NA.
